recent_calls.summary: The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and the user hanging up immediately without responding.

The user called to request plumbing service for a basement drain backup covered under their HSA home warranty. The agent collected the user's details, including service address, preferred appointment time, and contact preferences, and informed the user that the team would follow up the next business day with a confirmation. The user requested a text before the technician's arrival due to a non-working doorbell.

Jacob called Budget's after-hours assistant to leave a message requesting a callback from the office regarding a dispatch for one of his customers. The agent acknowledged the request and asked for more details to ensure the team is properly informed. The call ended before the user provided additional information.

Christine from American Home Shield called Budget's after-hours line to report a follow-up request for dispatch number 46567039 regarding an AC unit not pulling at the service address 115404 Smith Drive, St Louis, MO. The preferred follow-up time is 8 AM the next day, and the agent confirmed all details and assured the team would review and coordinate the service. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further instructions provided.

Nate called to check if a technician was still coming to service his air conditioning, as he had been waiting all day. The agent explained that since it was after hours, they could not confirm or connect him to a live person but documented his issue and assured a callback on the next business day. Nate declined further assistance and the call ended with a promise of follow-up.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and no further interaction from the user before the call ended.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves but no further conversation occurred before the user hung up.

Rico called to report that his air conditioning is blowing air but not cooling, suspecting low or no Freon despite a recent technician visit. He requested the earliest possible service at his home address and preferred text updates. He also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.

Sarah called to report that her technician missed a scheduled cooling service appointment and requested a response by the next morning to reschedule. The agent documented her concern, confirmed her contact details and service address, and assured her that the team would follow up promptly. Sarah declined information about maintenance programs and deferred feedback until after service completion.

Lina from American Home Shield called to provide an emergency dispatch number for an air conditioning system issue at a specific address. The agent documented the emergency and escalated the request for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended with the user confirming no further assistance was needed.
The call was very brief and did not progress beyond initial greetings. The user attempted to speak but the conversation ended abruptly without any clear request or resolution.

The user, Mark, called to report that a service technician did not arrive as scheduled to fix his air conditioning. The agent acknowledged the issue, documented it, and informed Mark that the team will follow up on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from the user.
The user requested to speak to a human agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer without further interaction.

The user called to inquire about the arrival time of workers who were supposed to come, as they had not received a call yet. The agent provided the business hours and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called back for Amy to schedule a standard service request related to heating and cooling. The agent gathered necessary information and then transferred the call to Amy for further assistance.

The user called to confirm the time of their appointment scheduled for June 3rd between 8 AM and 9 AM with technician Cole. The agent verified the user's details and confirmed the appointment time. The user had no updates or questions about the appointment.

The user, Cassandra Coleman, called to schedule a follow-up service to complete unfinished ductwork at her home. The agent collected her contact information and service address, acknowledged the urgency due to the heat, and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to inquire about pricing and scheduling for air conditioning and heating system tune-ups. The agent attempted to clarify the user's preferences and gather details for scheduling, but the conversation ended without a clear confirmation of the appointment. The user expressed interest in routine maintenance for both systems.
The user called and requested customer service. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to speak with a person about installing air conditioning. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

Elisa McCormick called to schedule a service for her central air unit under an American Home Shield home warranty. The agent collected details, noted the lack of a dispatch number, and confirmed a preferred appointment time of any day after 2:30 PM. Elisa expressed interest in receiving more information about home maintenance programs, and the agent assured a team member would follow up to coordinate the appointment.

The user called to confirm their appointment scheduled for today. The agent verified the user's details and appointment time, and the user updated the technician's arrival time to three o'clock. The agent assured the user that the information would be passed on and ended the call politely.

Denise from American Home Shield called to confirm a dispatch and ensure the ticket was opened. The agent confirmed the dispatch number and transferred Denise to a live representative for further questions about parts supply. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user requested to speak to a real person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a real person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user requested to speak to customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to confirm if Vernon would be at their house today. The agent verified the user's identity and phone number, then confirmed that Vernon is scheduled to arrive between 1 and 2 PM. The user had no further questions and ended the call politely.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The user called to leave a message for Daniel Lagars about a golf tournament on the eighth at the Optimist. The agent could not transfer the call but assured the user that the message would be passed along. The user did not request any additional services and ended the call politely.

The user called to speak with someone in billing but the agent was unable to connect the call to a live representative. The user requested a callback from the billing team, which the agent noted and assured would be arranged.

Patricia called to schedule her routine spring air conditioning cleaning and selected the earliest available slot on Wednesday, June 4th, from 4 to 6 PM. The agent provisionally booked the appointment and clarified the service details. When Patricia mentioned she had already paid for the package and expected no charge, the agent transferred her to the billing team for further assistance.

Patrick Wadlow called to schedule a standard repair for his upstairs air conditioning unit at his home in O'Fallon, Missouri. The agent confirmed his details and available appointment slots, and Patrick selected Friday, June 5th at 2 PM. When Patrick asked about the initial charge, the agent transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting. There was no conversation or task completed during the call.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to inquire about the technician's expected arrival time at 3910 Cordon Drive. The agent confirmed the appointment details and assured the user that the technician would call before arriving due to the unreliable doorbell. The call concluded with no further requests from the user.
The user called back after a missed call from Budget. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and requested to speak with someone at the center. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The agent greeted the user and asked for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.

The agent attempted to engage the user by asking for their service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after. No further information or assistance was provided during the call.
The user called to inquire about a missed appointment scheduled between nine and eleven. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The agent, Sophie, initiated the call to Chris, but the user responded that the agent had called them. The call ended shortly after without further conversation.
The user called to confirm if someone was coming to their place around noon for an appointment. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to inquire about their technician's arrival and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to find out the arrival time and location of Cole but was unable to get the address to work on their navigation system. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Ted from American Home Shield called to schedule a heating and cooling service appointment for Anthony McBee, a home owner, with a forced air system not working. The agent confirmed the service details, updated the service address and contact information, and noted the request for the earliest available appointment. Ted declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call.

The user called to report an emergency AC work order at 2018 Greenbrier Drive, Collinsville, Illinois. The agent collected the service address, phone number, and user's name but the user requested to speak to customer service, so the call was transferred to a live agent. The transfer was successful.

The user called to schedule a cooling service appointment through American Home Shield because their cooling system was not working. The agent confirmed the details, including the user's role as the owner and the preferred appointment day, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them soon. The user also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.
